---
name: Task
about: Standard task template for MovesBook development
labels: ''
---

## What
What needs to happen. 2-3 sentences max.

## Why
Why it matters. What problem it solves or what breaks without it.

## Scope
- What's included

## Not in scope
- What this issue deliberately excludes

## Context (optional)
Links, chat references, session IDs, or paste a ready prompt here.
